case_title: LI ZHANG ET AL VS. KUO H CHANG

docket_entries.description: REQUEST TO WAIVE COURT FEES AND COSTS PURSUANT TO G.C. 68633, CRC 3.51, 8.26, AND 8.818 (CONFIDENTIAL) FILED BY PLAINTIFF CHOW, MAN CHAP ORDER FOR WAIVER OF COURT FEES AND COSTS GRANTED PURSUANT TO G.C. 68634 (E), CRC 3.52

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF AUG-28-2017 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF AUG-28-2017 BY DONALD S. MITCHELL. PLAINTIFFS LI ZHANG AND MAN CHAP CHOW ARE PRESENT. ASSISTED BY REBECCA CHAU, CERTIFIED CANTONESE INTERPRETER. DEFENDANT KUO H. CHANG IS PRESENT. ASSISTED BY BANNIE CHOW, CERTIFIED CANTONESE INTERPRETER. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: DONALD S. MITCHELL; CLERK: J. MURPHY; NOT REPORTED. (506)

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF ZHANG, LI CHOW, MAN CHAP RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT CHANG, KUO H $2,204.40 PRINCIPAL, TOTAL JUDGMENT $2,204.40, CONCURRENTLY WITH PAYMENT OF THIS JUDGMENT, PLAINTIFFS SHALL RETURN TO DEFENDANT AT HIS BUSINESS ADDRESS THE FOLLOWING PROPERTY: DEFENDANT'S BUILDING PLANS. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
